6.definition: To assert the truth of, to affirm with confidence; to declare in a positive manner.

2.definition: A large and often winding stream which drains a land mass, carrying water down from higher areas to a lower point, oftentimes ending in another body of water, such as an ocean or in an inland sea.

4.definition: To make suitable; to make to correspond; to fit or suit
To harmonize in opinion, statement, or action; to be in unison or concord; to be or become united or consistent; to concur.
One who exerts power, or has the power to act
A book specially designed to keep photographs, stamps, or autographs.
A summons to arms, as on the approach of an enemy.

1.definition: An elongated curved tropical fruit that grows in bunches and has a creamy flesh and a smooth skin.
A person other than a family member, spouse or lover whose company one enjoys and towards whom one feels affection.
The colour of gold, butter, or a lemon; the colour obtained by mixing green and red light, or by subtracting blue from white light.
A group of people who are closely related to one another (by blood, marriage or adoption); kin; for example, a set of parents and their children; an immediate family.
(collective) A group of fish or a group of marine mammals such as porpoises, dolphins, or whales.

2.definition: A device for taking still or moving pictures or photographs.
A civil force granted the legal authority for law enforcement and maintaining public order.
A paintbrush.
A bag stitched to an item of clothing, used for carrying small items.
A stringed musical instrument, of European origin, usually with a fretted fingerboard and six strings, played with the fingers or a plectrum (guitar pick).
A colour/color that is a dark blend of red and blue; dark magenta.
A construction or natural feature that spans a divide.

Any member of the clade Simiiformes not also of the clade Hominoidea containing humans and apes, from which they are usually, but not universally, distinguished by smaller size, a tail, and cheek pouches.
A contiguous area of land, smaller than a continent, totally surrounded by water.
One that plays
A ceremonial duty or service, particularly:
An evergreen tree of the genus Citrus such as Citrus sinensis.
An outdoor area containing one or more types of plants, usually plants grown for food or ornamental purposes.
The child of a person's uncle or aunt; a first cousin.

A physician; a member of the medical profession; one who is trained and licensed to heal the sick or injured. The final examination and qualification may award a doctor degree in which case the post-nominal letters are D.O., DPM, M.D., DMD, DDS, in the US or MBBS in the UK.
A two-dimensional geometric figure, a line, consisting of the set of all those points in a plane that are equally distant from a given point (center).
A beverage made by infusing the beans of the coffee plant in hot water.
A mammal of the family Leporidae, with long ears, long hind legs and a short, fluffy tail.
A gathering of people for the purchase and sale of merchandise at a set time, often periodic.
A colorful, conspicuous structure associated with angiosperms, frequently scented and attracting various insects, and which may or may not be used for sexual reproduction.
The natural world; that which consists of all things unaffected by or predating human technology, production, and design. (Compare ecosystem.)
A midday meal (in a context in which the evening meal is called supper or tea).
Each of the seven major bodies which move relative to the fixed stars in the night sky—the Moon, Mercury, Venus, the Sun, Mars, Jupiter and Saturn.

4.definition: To be amazed at; to view with surprise; to marvel at.
(often in the plural) Something which is done or is to be done; business of any kind, commercial, professional, or public.
To give advice to; to offer an opinion to, as worthy or expedient to be followed.
The capacity, condition, or state of acting or of exerting power.
A temporally organized plan for matters to be attended to.
To incur, stand, or bear without serious detriment, as an act which might under other circumstances be injurious;—with an auxiliary, as can, could, might, etc.; to be able or rich enough.

6.definition: To deprive by or as if by violence; to rob; to strip; to benim.
A person in the lowest and most despicable condition; a castaway; outcast.

1.definition: A person who teaches, especially one employed in a school.
A person who studies or learns about a particular subject.

2.definition: A vehicle that has two wheels, one behind the other, a steering handle, and a saddle seat or seats and is usually propelled by the action of a rider’s feet upon pedals.

3.definition: A period of 100 consecutive years; often specifically a numbered period with conventional start and end dates, e.g., the twentieth century, which stretches from (strictly) 1901 through 2000, or (informally) 1900 through 1999. The first century AD was from 1 to 100.
The physical confine of a river or slough, consisting of a bed and banks.
A person who is very old.
An advantage; help or aid from something.
A device used to power electric devices, consisting of a set of electrically connected electrochemical or, archaically, electrostatic cells. A single such cell when used by itself.
A person who has converted to a religion.
A state in which opposing forces harmonise; equilibrium.
A storage closet either separate from, or built into, a wall.
A state of being away or withdrawn from a place or from companionship; the period of being away.
To strengthen; to make firm or resolute.
An organization, the objective of which is to carry out a charitable purpose.
The surroundings, circumstances, environment, background or settings that determine, specify, or clarify the meaning of an event or other occurrence.
(authorship) One of the main sections into which the text of a book is divided.
